zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Harcourt於1342年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯時，他的父親William de Harcourt42歲，母親Jane Grey40歲。他與Maud Grey在英國英格蘭奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 柏亞德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1417年4月12日在他的家鄉享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾藍頓 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Harcourt于1342年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯时，他的父亲William de Harcourt42岁，母亲Jane Grey40岁。他与Maud Grey在英国英格兰奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 柏亞德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1417年4月12日在他的家乡享年75岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾藍頓 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Harcourt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the places in Eure and Calvados named Harcourt, from Old French cour(t) ‘court, farmyard’ (see Court ) with an obscure first element. This surname is very rare in France.

English: habitational name from either of two places in Shropshire named Harcourt. The one near Cleobury Mortimer gets the name from Old English heafocere ‘hawker, falconer’ + cot ‘hut, cottage’; the one near Wem has as its first element Old English hearpere (see Harper ).

History: The surname of French origin (see 1 above) is listed along with the equally rare or even extinct variants or altered forms Haraucourt, Herancourt, and Héraucourt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Court
meanings: English: topographic or occupational name from Middle English curt, court ‘large house’ (a word of the same ultimately Latin origin as 2 below), denoting someone who lived or worked in a manor house or castle, a courtly retainer.
French: topographic name from Old French co(u)rt ‘court, farmyard’ (from Latin cohors, cors, genitive cohortis, cortis ‘court, farmyard, enclosure’).

English and French: nickname for a physically small man, or ironically for a large man, from the adjective Middle English curt, Old French co(u)rt ‘short, small’ (from Latin curtus ‘curtailed, truncated, cut short, broken off’). Compare French Lecourt .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Harcourt was born in 1342, in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, his father, William de Harcourt, was 42 and his mother, Jane Grey, was 40. He married Maud Grey in Rotherfield Peppard, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 12 April 1417, in his hometown, at the age of 75, and was buried in Ranton Abbey, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Harcourt est né en 1342, à Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, William de Harcourt, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Jane Grey, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Maud Grey à Rotherfield Peppard, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 12 avril 1417, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Ranton Abbey, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Harcourt 1342 in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Harcourt 42 und seine Mutter Jane Grey 40. Er hat in Rotherfield Peppard, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Maud Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 12. April 1417 im Alter von 75 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Ranton Abbey, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Harcourt è nato il nel 1342 nel Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, William de Harcourt, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Jane Grey, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Maud Grey nel Rotherfield Peppard, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 12 aprile 1417, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Ranton Abbey, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Harcourtが1342年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアマーケト ボスウオルスで生まれた時，父William de Harcourtは42歳，母Jane Greyは40歳であった。イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアロスエルフィールド ペッパルドでMaud Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1417年4月12日に故郷で75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアラントン アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Stanton, Harcourt, Oxfordshire, England,: 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스탠턴 스트 존
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Harcourt(이)가 1342년 영국 레이스스터실르 마크트 보스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Harcourt(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Grey(은)는 40세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 로더필드 p파르드에서 Maud Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1417년 4월 12일 그의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 랜턴 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Harcourt nasceu em 1342, em Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Harcourt, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Jane Grey, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Grey em Rotherfield Peppard, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de abril de 1417, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Ranton Abbey, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Stanton, Harcourt, Oxfordshire, England,: стантон ст джон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Harcourt родился в 1342 г. в местности маркет босворт, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Harcourt было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Grey, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Grey в местности ротирфиелд пеппард, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 12 апреля 1417 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности рантон эбби, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Harcourt nació en 1342, en Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Harcourt, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Jane Grey, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Maud Grey en Rotherfield Peppard, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 12 de abril de 1417, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Ranton Abbey, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
